    \(L\)-smooth Interpolation

    ← Gallery Open in Desmos ↗
    Interpolation
    Parameters
    \(L\) = 2.34

    Not interpolable! All \(Q_{i,j}\) must be nonnegative, but cocoercivity from
    \((i,j)\) =

    Gradients
    \(g_1\) = -0.60
    \(g_2\) = 0.00
    \(g_3\) = 0.66

    Write-up coming soon.
